a_image.alt: Corporate UI style mood board — Business · Enterprise

sections.a_eyebrow: Professional · Corporate · Flat Design · Balanced · Clean UI
sections.a_description: Professional blues, structured grids, and the measured confidence of enterprise design systems — Corporate UI is the aesthetic of trust at scale. Every element signals reliability: the corporate blue accent communicates stability, the structured layouts suggest organizational competence, and the minimal decoration says 'we take your business seriously, not ourselves.'

This enterprise-grade style powers internal tools at Fortune 500 companies, B2B SaaS platforms, banking interfaces, and government portals. You'll see it on Salesforce dashboards, SAP interfaces, enterprise resource planners, and corporate intranets — anywhere that millions of professional users need clarity, consistency, and the implicit trust that comes from familiar, structured design patterns.

a_image_cover.alt: Corporate UI style use case illustration
Corporate UI style use case illustration
Corporate UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The reliable, trust-building aesthetic of corporate enterprise interfaces — structured grids, professional blue palettes, and the measured confidence of Fortune 500 design systems. Background: clean white (#ffffff). The .inner panel has a light gray background (#f4f4f4) with a 1px border (#e0e0e0) and 4px border-radius — minimal rounding that signals professionalism over playfulness. Colors: corporate blue (#0f62fe) as the primary accent — the blue of trust, stability, and enterprise reliability. Dark charcoal (#161616) for headings, medium gray (#525252) for body text. The aesthetic is measured and dependable — every choice signals competence and trustworthiness. Set in IBM Plex Sans — the typeface of enterprise technology, designed for clarity at any size and weight. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #161616. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #0f62fe. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #525252. Buttons: primary — corporate blue (#0f62fe), white text, 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, blue border. Alternatives: Source Sans 3 (Adobe corporate), Noto Sans (Google corporate).
